message: Fix CI by installing ALSA dev libs

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,9 @@ jobs:
           go-version: '1.22.x'
           check-latest: true
 
+      - name: Install system dependencies (audio)
+        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libasound2-dev
+
       - name: Cache Go modules
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
